steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Predict Policy Simulation Negative Tests · Theory Policy Simulation…
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 1478 during a AWS SDK v3 dependency canary. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to evaluate a runtime-validated explicit-deny-aware tenant authorization record; bound bytes, time, attempts, promises, streams, concurrency, cache, and spend; then deliver a duplicate or reordered event and prevent duplicate stakeholder effect. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: In a strict Node 24 and TypeScript 7 service, review effective permissions with policy analysis, simulation, denied changed cases, temporary credentials, and CloudTrail evidence.
